assertions.text: No let or const in JS block — ES5 only
Checks actor.role === 'CEO' or 'ADMIN' before showing the panel
assertions.evidence: Uses data.perms.canManageStaff — field does not exist in real codebase (real perms has canCreateJob, canViewAll, isQcReviewer, isDesigner). Panel would never show.

assertions.text: No http:// or https:// URL references (no external CDN)
Shows a spinner or loading indicator while the call is in flight
Renders server response in a status element after the call completes
assertions.evidence: adminSetStatus() sets textContent on success and failure
